name: Stable Diffusion WebUI
author: Modly
description: Generate images via a locally-running Automatic1111 SD WebUI instance (--api flag required). Tip: close SD WebUI before the 3D generation step to free ~12 GB VRAM.

params_schema.label: API Base URL
params_schema.tooltip: SD WebUI base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7860). Leave empty to use the app default. Remember to close SD WebUI before 3D generation to free ~12 GB VRAM.

params_schema.label: Prompt
params_schema.tooltip: Positive prompt. If a text node is wired in, its text is prepended automatically.

params_schema.label: Width
params_schema.tooltip: Output image width in pixels (multiple of 64).

params_schema.label: Height
params_schema.tooltip: Output image height in pixels (multiple of 64).

params_schema.label: Sampler
params_schema.tooltip: Sampler name exactly as shown in SD WebUI (e.g. Euler a, DPM++ 2M Karras).

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Random seed. Use -1 for a random seed each run.

params_schema.label: API Base URL
params_schema.tooltip: SD WebUI base URL (e.g. http://127.0.0.1:7860). Leave empty to use the app default. Remember to close SD WebUI before 3D generation to free ~12 GB VRAM.

params_schema.tooltip: Positive prompt. If a text node is wired in, its text is prepended automatically.

params_schema.tooltip: Output image width in pixels (multiple of 64).

params_schema.label: Height
params_schema.tooltip: Output image height in pixels (multiple of 64).

params_schema.label: Sampler
params_schema.tooltip: Sampler name exactly as shown in SD WebUI.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Random seed. Use -1 for a random seed each run.

params_schema.label: Denoise
params_schema.tooltip: How much the image changes: 0 = identical, 1 = fully redrawn.
